editor_settings.title: Before You Buy the Canon G7X Mark III for Photography, Read This
editor_settings.content:
1. The TikTok Hype Focuses on Video

If you scroll through TikTok, 99% of the praise for the Canon G7X Mark III is about its vlogging capabilities. But what if you just want to take photos? Are you making a mistake by buying it for still photography?

2. The Strengths for Stills

For photography, the G7X Mark III is a monster in a tiny body. Its primary weapon is the famous Canon Color Science. Photos straight out of the camera have beautifully natural skin tones and rich contrast. You almost never need to run them through Lightroom.

3. The Lens Speeds

The attached lens is an equivalent 24-100mm f/1.8-2.8. That f/1.8 aperture at the wide end means you can shoot in incredibly dim restaurants or at night without the flash, and still get clean, noise-free shots. Most kit lenses on DSLRs are f/3.5, which are terrible in the dark.

@by.diila In love this camera💌 definitely worth the hype🥹 #canoncamera

4. The Limitations

The burst rate is phenomenal (up to 30fps), but its autofocus system is heavily contrast-based. It occasionally struggles to lock onto fast-moving subjects like sports cars or running dogs. If you shoot portraits, street, or travel photography, it's brilliant. If you shoot sports, look elsewhere.

If you scroll through TikTok, 99% of the praise for the Canon G7X Mark III is about its vlogging capabilities. But what if you just want to take photos? Are you making a mistake by buying it for still photography?

The attached lens is an equivalent 24-100mm f/1.8-2.8. That f/1.8 aperture at the wide end means you can shoot in incredibly dim restaurants or at night without the flash, and still get clean, noise-free shots. Most kit lenses on DSLRs are f/3.5, which are terrible in the dark.

The burst rate is phenomenal (up to 30fps), but its autofocus system is heavily contrast-based. It occasionally struggles to lock onto fast-moving subjects like sports cars or running dogs. If you shoot portraits, street, or travel photography, it's brilliant. If you shoot sports, look elsewhere.
editor_settings.author: Roderick Scott
editor_settings.meta_description: The G7X Mark III is everywhere on TikTok, but if you're buying it strictly for still photography, you might be setting yourself up for disappointment.
